[[Xishel]] was a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] who was searching for the lost treasure of the famous [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Celis Mott]]. He employed [[Marka Durn]] to locate the treasure. After Durn had found the treasure on a remote asteroid, he was quickly killed on Xishel's orders. However, Durn had hidden the location of Mott's treasure in the databanks of the computer onboard the ''[[Deephopper|DeepHopper]]'' and Xishel was foiled.<ref name="treasure" />

==Equipment==
He wielded a [[Model 44 blaster pistol]].<ref name="treasure" />
